title: MoreArmors
description: Adds multiple new armor sets to Minecraft, including Copper, Steel, Amethyst, Emerald, Obsidian, Slime, and Magma Cream armors. Expand your armor choices and enhance your adventure
body:
# More Armor - Expand Your Armor Choices
📜 Mod Description
More Armor is a Minecraft mod that adds various new material armors to the game, expanding your adventure equipment options! From classic copper armor to unique slime and magma cream armor, this mod brings fresh protective choices to your gameplay.

 
## 🛡️ New Armor Types
Copper Armor - Basic but reliable protection

Steel Armor - Sturdy and durable metal armor

Amethyst Armor - Elegant and mystical magical protection

Emerald Armor - Luxurious and precious equipment

Obsidian Armor - Ultimate defense with volcanic material

Slime Armor - Unique elastic equipment

Magma Cream Armor - Special fiery protection

End Elytra - More powerful flight ability
![all armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f597212332a44c5bcca32045acfdac9cb110070.png)

#  🎮 Acquisition Methods
All armors can be obtained through standard crafting recipes:

Craft using corresponding materials in the crafting table

Some materials need to be smelted in a blast furnace

 
 
##  **⚠️ Maintenance Notice**
Please note that the author's time and abilities are limited, and this mod may not receive frequent updates or maintenance. We appreciate your understanding.
